title: RFC 9309 Matching, Failure Semantics, Caching, and Go Adapter · Failure Repair Bay
summary: A preserved Go crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, transport, body, tokenizer, goquery, frontier, goroutine, Colly callback, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first broken invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in conformance-tested robots decision engine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Fetch `/robots.txt` at the correct service origin with an honest stable product token and contact identity.
Apply RFC 9309 product-token matching, group merge, percent encoding, longest rule, and allow tie behavior.
Classify success, redirects, unavailable, unreachable, oversized, malformed, stale cache, and owner-stop states conservatively.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Robots Origin Agent
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 4580 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove RFC 9309 matching, response states, caching, Go package conformance, and extension restraint; every URL, body, tree, record, frontier transition, and report row retains causal identity; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Fetch `/robots.txt` at the correct service origin with an honest stable product token and contact identity.

Inspect the Robots Origin Agent trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
